'''âs-p-l''' ('''sapala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maffick|maffick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maffick|maffick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-p-l
|-
! Lemma
| sapala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sapalithi|sapalithi]] || [[word:sapaliji|sapaliji]] || [[word:sapalishi|sapalishi]] || [[word:sapali|sapali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sapaluthuth|sapaluthuth]] || [[word:sapalujuj|sapalujuj]] || [[word:sapalushush|sapalushush]] || [[word:sapal|sapal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sapaluthu|sapaluthu]] || [[word:sapaluju|sapaluju]] || [[word:sapalushu|sapalushu]] || [[word:sapalu|sapalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sapalufuth|sapalufuth]] || [[word:sapalufuj|sapalufuj]] || [[word:sapalufush|sapalufush]] || [[word:sapaluf|sapaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sapalethe|sapalethe]] || [[word:sapaleje|sapaleje]] || [[word:sapaleshe|sapaleshe]] || [[word:sapale|sapale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sapalothoth|sapalothoth]] || [[word:sapalojoj|sapalojoj]] || [[word:sapaloshosh|sapaloshosh]] || [[word:sapal|sapal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sapalotho|sapalotho]] || [[word:sapalojo|sapalojo]] || [[word:sapalosho|sapalosho]] || [[word:sapalo|sapalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sapalofoth|sapalofoth]] || [[word:sapalofoj|sapalofoj]] || [[word:sapalofosh|sapalofosh]] || [[word:sapalof|sapalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sapalĂŠthĂŠ|sapalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sapalĂŠjĂŠ|sapalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sapalĂŠshĂŠ|sapalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sapalĂŠ|sapalĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sapalathath|sapalathath]] || [[word:sapalajaj|sapalajaj]] || [[word:sapalashash|sapalashash]] || [[word:sapal|sapal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sapalatha|sapalatha]] || [[word:sapalaja|sapalaja]] || [[word:sapalasha|sapalasha]] || [[word:sapala|sapala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sapalafath|sapalafath]] || [[word:sapalafaj|sapalafaj]] || [[word:sapalafash|sapalafash]] || [[word:sapalaf|sapalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sapalasha|sapalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosapalasha|gosapalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisapalasha|gokisapalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sapalnĂŒsha|sapalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosapalnknĂŒsha|gosapalnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisapalnĂŒsha|gokisapalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sapalshĂ«sha|sapalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosapalnkshĂ«sha|gosapalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisapalshĂ«sha|gokisapalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sapalrosha|sapalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosapalnkrosha|gosapalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisapalrosha|gokisapalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sapalmusha|sapalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosapalnkmusha|gosapalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisapalmusha|gokisapalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sapalsherasha|sapalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosapalnksherasha|gosapalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisapalsherasha|gokisapalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sapalngasha|sapalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosapalnkngasha|gosapalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisapalngasha|gokisapalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sapalyasha|sapalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosapalnkyasha|gosapalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisapalyasha|gokisapalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sapalyamasha|sapalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosapalnkyamasha|gosapalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisapalyamasha|gokisapalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sapalnĂŒshĂ«sha|sapalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosapalnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosapalnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisapalnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisapalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sapalnĂŒrosha|sapalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosapalnknĂŒrosha|gosapalnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisapalnĂŒrosha|gokisapalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sapalnĂŒmusha|sapalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosapalnknĂŒmusha|gosapalnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisapalnĂŒmusha|gokisapalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sapalshĂ«nĂŒsha|sapalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosapalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosapalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisapalshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisapalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sapalshĂ«rosha|sapalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosapalnkshĂ«rosha|gosapalnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisapalshĂ«rosha|gokisapalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sapalshĂ«musha|sapalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosapalnkshĂ«musha|gosapalnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisapalshĂ«musha|gokisapalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sapalronĂŒsha|sapalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosapalnkronĂŒsha|gosapalnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisapalronĂŒsha|gokisapalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sapalroshĂ«sha|sapalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosapalnkroshĂ«sha|gosapalnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisapalroshĂ«sha|gokisapalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sapalromusha|sapalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosapalnkromusha|gosapalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisapalromusha|gokisapalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sapalmunĂŒsha|sapalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosapalnkmunĂŒsha|gosapalnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisapalmunĂŒsha|gokisapalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sapalmushĂ«sha|sapalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosapalnkmushĂ«sha|gosapalnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisapalmushĂ«sha|gokisapalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sapalmurosha|sapalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosapalnkmurosha|gosapalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisapalmurosha|gokisapalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sapal|sapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠpĂŠl|sĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosapal|hosapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠpĂŠl|hosĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosapal|hohosapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠpĂŠl|hohosĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsapal|nĂŒsapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŒsĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsapal|nĂŒnĂŒsapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsapal|nĂŻsapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŻsĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsapal|nĂŻnĂŻsapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusapal|lusapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠpĂŠl|lusĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusapal|lulusapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠpĂŠl|lulusĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisapal|lisapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠpĂŠl|lisĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisapal|lilisapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠpĂŠl|lilisĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosapal|kosapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠpĂŠl|kosĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosapal|kokosapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠpĂŠl|kokosĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesapal|kesapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠpĂŠl|kesĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesapal|kekesapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠpĂŠl|kekesĂŠpĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
